proposal.claim: TruncateLog is redundant because CommitEntry already manages log consistency
proposal.structural_delta: remove one action, simplify log management
proposal.diff:
--- a/log_replication.tla
+++ b/log_replication.tla
@@ -30,8 +30,0 @@
-TruncateLog(replica, index) ==
-  /\ log' = [log EXCEPT ![replica] = SubSeq(log[replica], 1, index)]

review.argument: TruncateLog is used by C3 for surgical rollback. removing it breaks ViewChangeLogIntegrity.
review.counterexample: view change needs to truncate divergent entries from old leader

judgment.reasoning: TruncateLog is not redundant, needed by C3 for rollback
